Video.summary: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.
Video.title: A Wolf's Journey

Video.summary: Can animals develop their own health care strategies? Learn more in this humorous investigation.
Video.title: Animal Doctors

Video.summary: How to protect the last baboons of the Table Mountain region? Teach them to fear humans.
Video.title: Baboon Bandits

Video.summary: Explore Antarctica, one of the world's most beautiful, yet inhospitable, landscapes.
Video.title: Antarctica

Video.summary: The love story between chickens and men has lasted for over 5000 years.
Video.title: Chicken Planet

Video.summary: The orchard is a unique ecosystem. As seasons change, we experience the interplay of nature, man, and animal.
Video.title: Carousel of Life

Video.summary: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.
Video.title: Okavango: Water in the Desert

Video.summary: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it shows no sign of losing popularity with animals and people.
Video.title: Namibia: Sands of Time

Video.summary: Ngorongoro is a land full of wildlife, from proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.
Video.title: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire

Video.summary: Living in darkness is another effective survival tactic. Here we see those animals who only come out at night.
Video.title: After Dark

Video.summary: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sense of Timing

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Underwater

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sky

Video.summary: The West Coast of Madagascar is remote and inhospitable but home to an astonishing array of animals.
Video.title: The Wild West Coast

Video.summary: The Northeast of Madagascar is a major trading center and one of the most species-rich regions in the world.
Video.title: The Forest of the Northeast

Video.summary: Zambezi’s long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.
Video.title: Zambezi: Wild Water

Video.summary: Ancient Egypt, one of the history’s most powerful civilizations, depended on the Nile.
Video.title: Nile: An African Odyssey

Video.summary: The Virunga Mountains are the embodiment of western fantasies about deep, dark, Africa.
Video.title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

Image.alt: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

Video.summary: Madagascar is truly a weird and wonderful land, isolated on an island of extreme and magical locations.
Video.title: Madagascar: Island of Monsters

Video.summary: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa.
Video.title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

Image.alt: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

Video.summary: Stretching 1,500 miles, Africa’s Cape Coast is where irresistible force meet immoveable object.
Video.title: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Collide

Video.summary: In this episode we find out more about the sensory powers used by animals to make messages loud and clear.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Communication

Video.summary: Come and see the champions of the animal kingdom and marvel at their perfect adaptations!
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: The Most Amazing Senses

Video.summary: Take an exciting journey of discovery into an almost untouched wilderness: The Jura Mountains.
Video.title: The Jura Mountains

Video.summary: This episode focuses on Ticino, reaching from the Tessin Alps down to the charming Muggio Valley.
Video.title: Ticino

Video.summary: Take an amazing journey from the highest peaks of the Bernese Alps to a spectacular finish at the Rhine Falls.
Video.title: Water and Ice

Video.summary: The ibex, marmot, and European adder have all developed strategies to survive the harsh alpine winter.
Video.title: Winter in the Swiss Alps
